candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As shown, a picture P of weight W is hung by two strings as shown. The magnitude of the tension force of each string is T. The total upward pull of the strings on the picture is:
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 如图所示,一个重量为 $w$ 的物体 $p$ 被两根等长的轻质量绳索悬挂,两根绳索与水平面成 $\theta$ 角。设每根绳索所受张力为 $T$,则物体 $p$ 所受合力的大小为:

normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: As shown, a picture P of weight W is hung by two strings. The magnitude of the tension force of each string is T. What is the total upward pull of the strings on the picture? Express your answer in terms of T and \theta.

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The text and diagram together clearly define the physics setup. The image is needed to see that theta is measured relative to the horizontal, making the upward component of each tension T sin(theta), so the total upward pull is understandable as 2T sin(theta).

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
